---
title: "Solution 4A — Microbiome missing data (imputation inside grouped CV)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-tools: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidymodels)
  library(dplyr)
})
source("_load_microbiome.R")
```

```{r mic-na}
set.seed(4)
mic <- load_microbiome()
otu_cols <- mic_otu_cols(mic)
mic_na <- mic
na_sex <- sample(which(!is.na(mic_na$Sex)), size = round(0.15 * nrow(mic_na)))
mic_na$Sex[na_sex] <- NA

tibble(
  rows = nrow(mic_na),
  sex_missing = sum(is.na(mic_na$Sex)),
  rows_after_drop_na = nrow(tidyr::drop_na(mic_na, Sex))
)
```

```{r recipes}
rec_impute <- recipe(Label ~ ., data = mic_na) |>
  update_role(sample_id, Individual, new_role = "id") |>
  step_impute_mode(Sex) |>
  step_mutate(across(all_of(otu_cols), ~ log1p(.x))) |>
  step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
  step_dummy(Sex) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

rec_drop <- recipe(Label ~ ., data = tidyr::drop_na(mic_na, Sex)) |>
  update_role(sample_id, Individual, new_role = "id") |>
  step_mutate(across(all_of(otu_cols), ~ log1p(.x))) |>
  step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
  step_dummy(Sex) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

xgb_spec <- boost_tree(trees = 80, tree_depth = 3, learn_rate = 0.08) |>
  set_engine("xgboost") |>
  set_mode("classification")

folds <- mic_group_folds(mic_na, v = 5)
metrics_cls <- metric_set(roc_auc)
```

```{r compare}
set.seed(14)
rs_impute <- fit_resamples(
  workflow() |> add_recipe(rec_impute) |> add_model(xgb_spec),
  folds, metrics = metrics_cls
)
rs_drop <- fit_resamples(
  workflow() |> add_recipe(rec_drop) |> add_model(xgb_spec),
  mic_group_folds(tidyr::drop_na(mic_na, Sex), v = 5),
  metrics = metrics_cls
)

bind_rows(
  collect_metrics(rs_impute) |> mutate(strategy = "Impute Sex in recipe (grouped CV)"),
  collect_metrics(rs_drop) |> mutate(strategy = "Complete cases only (grouped CV)")
) |>
  select(strategy, mean, std_err)
```

**Leakage note:** Imputation must be fit **inside** each resample fold (the recipe does this). Dropping NA on the full table before CV discards data and still risks optimistic bias if you ever impute globally.

```{r session, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
